abilities: Vulpine slam! (when affected by friendly Kiriko 's Kitsune Rush)
chatter: Our future will be forged in conflict.
Curse me all you want. Without conflict, there is no future for humanity.
I hope they put up a fight.
Power means nothing if you do not put it to use.
You know our plans. If humanity is to survive, we must not fail. (with Moira , Reaper , Sombra and Widowmaker on the team)
Let this challenge be a lesson.
Let us close the grip around their necks.
Do not falter. This is where we prove our worth.
The best victories begin with adversity.
We may be behind, but we are not defeated yet.
I've come too far to stop now.
That was rude. (eliminated after a multi-kill)
Certainly her mother 's daughter. (eliminated by Kiriko )
A thorn in Vishkar's side... and mine. (eliminated by Lifeweaver )
Good to see my lieutenants keeping sharp. (eliminated by Moira , Reaper , Sombra or Widowmaker )
Chase was always the best of them. (eliminated by Sojourn )
Power is nothing without a plan.
I am always five steps ahead.
You know who pays the bills.
As though I needed the help.
You are a glutton for punishment.
call-outs: Hold up the defense until the end!
They're getting desperate. Hold your ground.
We've almost won. Stand strong a little longer.
There is no more time. Seize victory, now!
Time draws short. Prevail, or die.
eliminations: The future has no place for you.
I'm the strongest version of myself. (eliminating another Doomfist )
The main event is over. (eliminating another Doomfist )
And that's why I'm the boss. (eliminating Mauga )
Don't ask for a rematch. (eliminating Mauga )
Remember: you demanded this challenge. (eliminating Mauga )
Try three hearts next time. (eliminating Mauga )
Your services are no longer required. (eliminating Moira , Sigma or Sombra )
We trained you better than this. (eliminating Widowmaker )
You thought me vulnerable. *scoff* (on low HP)
Never turn your back on a threat. (while behind enemy)
I was faster. (enemy uses movement-based ability)
Test my reflexes? Ha! (enemy uses movement-based ability)
You should never let down your guard. Never! (eliminating Bastion using Configuration: Artillery, or Junkrat using Rip-Tire)
* laugh * Like a snowball down a hill. (eliminating Mei using Blizzard)
Two Amaris foiled at once. (eliminating Nano-Boosted Pharah )
I instructed you to be more careful, Reyes. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
Do not make promises you cannot keep. (eliminating Sojourn using Overclock)
Your rage is pointless. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Agh... an immobilized target is an unsatisfying kill. (eliminating an enemy stuck in a Graviton Surge)
You look like me, but you don't move like me. (unknown trigger against another Doomfist )
I read the pattern in the raindrops. (eliminating Sombra using Stealth on Overcast maps)
You put up a poor fight.
Send me someone who can fight back!
Who is the next fool to defy me?
Moira, we must replicate this "Nano Boost"... (while Nano-Boosted by friendly Ana with Moira on your team)
Each blow purposeful. Each kill, earned.
I always have the last word.
I thought you were a challenger...
In the end, I was better.
Do not make this a habit.
I can't fight all your battles for you.
There will be no next time.
I thought you could handle yourself... (to Mauga )
Try to land on your feet. *laughs*
Pursue that ferocity. It will lead you to greatness.
What else are you capable of?
And this is why I chose you. (to Mauga )
With Talon , you have found great power. (to Reaper )
As cutthroat as the day I met you. (to Widowmaker )
interactions: Doomfist : You were truly fearsome in your prime. Ana : I wanted respect. Not fear.
Doomfist : Even past your prime, you are more lethal than ever. Ana : Some people improve with age. Others... never quite learn to keep their mouths shut.
Ashe : Your parents ever pester you about goin' back to the family business? Doomfist : They are supportive of my work, now that they have seen what I've become. Ashe : How sweet of them.
Doomfist : I grow tired of chasing you. Baptiste : You're tired?! Imagine me.
Doomfist : You're coming with us, Augustin. Baptiste : Why won't you leave me alone? Widowmaker : You're lucky. I just wanted to kill you.
Brigitte : *sigh* I can't believe I have to work with criminals. Doomfist : A great leader adapts to their team. Not the other way around.
Doomfist : Why did the chicken cross the road? One of two: Brigitte : Why? Junkrat : Why? Doomfist : Because to stagnate is to die. Never forget that.

Doomfist : Overwatch again, Cassidy? Haven't they proven unworthy of your talents? Cassidy : Well it's that or spend the rest of my life passed out in various diners. Doomfist : There are other options. Cassidy : Sorry, uh... Talon 's my third choice.
Doomfist : You didn't fail Overwatch, Cassidy. Overwatch failed you . Cassidy : I'm pretty sure it was mutual.
Doomfist : How does one so young become Korea 's strongest warrior? D.Va : I'm the best. That's all you need to know. Doomfist : *laughs* Confidence! Let's hope it's not unfounded.
Doomfist : Who taught you the blade? Genji : The best swordmaster in the world. Doomfist : *tsk* Her ...
Genji : Talon. You are lucky I do not cut you down where you stand. Doomfist : *laugh* We would welcome the challenge.
Doomfist : The Shimada could rise again, if you so choose. Hanzo : There is nothing to that name, but pain. Doomfist : Pain... and a sleeping dragon. Wake. Him. Up.

Hazard : Pain makes power. You really believed that? Doomfist : You adapted after great injury. Is that not strength through suffering? Hazard : Nah, it's my friends that made me who I am. I've them to thank. Doomfist : And more to lose than you think.
Doomfist : You seem lost. Searching for your place in the world? Illari : No, I wouldn't know where to look. Doomfist : Embrace your inner conflict, and like-minded people will find you.

Junker Queen : Ain't easy, is it? Being in charge of killers and madmen? Doomfist : No. But I welcome the challenge. Junker Queen : We got a lot in common. Shame I'm gonna kill ya someday. Doomfist : *chuckle* Indeed.
Junkrat : Doomfist. Doom... fist! Haha! It's a great name! Doomfist : What's yours? Junkrat : They call me... Junkrat! Doomfist : Not as good. Junkrat : *sigh* No... not as good.
Doomfist : You are bold to stand against Vishkar on your own. Lifeweaver : I'm not alone. The scientific community is on my side! Doomfist : It would be wise not to count on that for long.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Doomfist : Whichever is strongest. (pause) I'm also fond of starlings. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!

Doomfist : The Circuit Royal. A contest of will and technical ingenuity. A dance of beauty... and destruction. Lúcio : Is everything poetry and philosophy with you? Doomfist : Everything is, when you pay attention.
Mauga : You ever worry the Fist is making you rusty? Doomfist : Hmph. How about a match after this? To address your... concerns.

Mei : Doomfist, how can you live with yourself? So many people have died because of you! Doomfist : Yes, but many more have lived. Mei : That makes no sense! Do you hear yourself? Ugh, you're the worst.

Doomfist : I have yet to see a report on your latest experiment. Moira : It's making progress. Doomfist : Our timeline is non-negotiable. Moira : Keep interrupting me. Surely that will expedite things.
Moira : This foolish mission is taking time away from my experiments, Akande. Doomfist : Think of it as... fieldwork.
Orisa : Efi visited her cousin recently. I will not forgive what Talon turned him into. Doomfist : Ah, yes. How is Bisi enjoying prison? Orisa : Ask... when I lock you up with him.

Doomfist : Has the child reconsidered my offer? She would thrive with Talon's resources. Orisa : You stand for everything wrong in this world. Efi will never join you. Doomfist : If she cannot comprehend the era that awaits us, then perhaps I have no use for her after all.
Doomfist : Your new weapons are impressive, but you lack the strength to wield them. Orisa : Efi made me kind. She did not make me weak.
Doomfist : You know the plan. Reaper : Leave no one alive.
Doomfist : I hope this iteration of Overwatch proves more durable than the last. Sojourn : If I were you, I'd be more worried about what's going to happen to Talon.
Doomfist : You and Reyes were both enhanced soldiers. Yet, he reached his full potential, and you... Soldier: 76 : I wouldn't say he's thriving. Doomfist : Hmm... Are you?
Doomfist : A claw hand? Inefficient. Torbjörn : Well, we can't all have ultra-powerful gauntlets. Doomfist : No. You cannot.

Doomfist : Reclaiming your father's empire will not be so simple. Vendetta : My plans go far beyond what my father could have ever achieved. Doomfist : Let's see how far that ambition carries you. Vendetta : I'll make sure you have a front row seat.

Venture: What's Talon looking for in ancient ruins? Doomfist: That is none of your concern. Venture: Yuh-huh, it's my concern. I'm gonna find it before it falls into your hands! Doomfist: Let the matter rest. For your sake, and the world's.
Doomfist : Cover me. Widowmaker : When have I not?
Winston : Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Doomfist : *sigh* I do not.
Wrecking Ball : How do you keep track of your master plans? Doomfist : True tacticians do not plan. They act... and force others to react. Wrecking Ball : The hamster uses a puffy notebook.

Wuyang : Whoa, that is a big fist. You look straight out of a fighting game! Doomfist : Every fight is a game. I have never lost. Wuyang : Huh... I get the feeling you aren't playing around in arcades.
Zarya : Nowhere to run. Doomfist : Nowhere to hide.
Zenyatta : Seeking progress by sowing chaos is like planting a tree in a volcano. Doomfist : Exactly.

One of three: Reinhardt : What did you do, you know, before the Crisis? Tracer : Tekhartha Zenyatta. If you don't mind me asking, what did you do before the Crisis? Zarya : What was your function before the Crisis? Zenyatta : I collected payments at a laser tag arena. I was a lifeguard. At a water park. I served coffee. I drove a tractor. I massaged sheep on a free-range pasture. Doomfist : Is that true? One of two: Genji: He won't tell me either. Ramattra: Ha! I don't think so, but he wouldn't tell me either.
map-specific: Tonight, we will put them to rest. (match start)
Pummel them like the rain. (match start)
Each Gwishin attack strengthens the defenders, as a furnace hardens steel.
No one expected the Roman Empire to fall. Perhaps that is why it did.
Lucheng understands an important fact: as long as we are shackled to a single planet, we are vulnerable.
If only you could see me now, Adeyemi .
Just as sheep must have a shepherd, Numbani must have me.
